arts.ttl: Serie A | Cagliari v Lazio: Match Preview
arts.sum: As Serie A action heats up, Cagliari prepare to host Lazio at the Unipol Domus on Monday in a match that could have significant implications for both teams' seasons. With Cagliari fighting to avoid relegation and Lazio aiming to secure a top-four finish, this clash promises to be an intriguing battle. arts.ttl: Lazio Reignite Pursuit of Empoli’s Jacopo Fazzini
arts.sum: Lazio have rekindled their interest in Empoli's young midfielder Jacopo Fazzini, breathing new life into negotiations that had cooled in recent weeks. The Roman club have returned with renewed determination to secure the services of the talented 22-year-old.
